digital_presence_audit.bio_text: Helping small businesses grow with content. DM for collabs.

observation_notes.content_shape: Mix of single-photo posts (~60%) and reels (~40%). Production is polished, with consistent typography overlays.
observation_notes.engagement: Average ~30 comments per post. Lead replies to ~half of comments, mostly with a heart emoji or short thanks.
observation_notes.pace: Feed shows ~12 posts in the last 30 days, suggesting roughly 3 posts/week.
observation_notes.people_orientation: Captions are warm and use first-person plural ("we", "our team"). Replies to comments thank the commenter by name.
observation_notes.pressure_tells: One post from last week is a caption apologising for slow DM replies — visible scaling pain.
observation_notes.self_presentation: Lead's face appears in ~70% of posts, in professional but approachable settings (office, casual headshots).

lead_observation.screenshot_summary: Screenshot 1: profile header with bio and follower count. Screenshot 2: grid of 9 recent posts. Screenshot 3: comments on a recent post.
what_i_could_not_determine: Whether the lead has a separate business email
Whether the website has a booking system

content_themes.example_post: Carousel: "5 ways to write a hook that stops the scroll."
Reel: filming setup for an upcoming client launch.
Single image: "Booking 2 more clients for August — DM to apply."
Photo with caption: "3 years ago today I quit my job..."

engagement_patterns.reply_behavior: Replies to ~50% of comments, warmly but briefly.

operational_pain_points: Slow DM replies (apologised in a post)

sales_recommendation.likely_pain_point: Manual DM management is eating content production time.
sales_recommendation.pitch_angle: Position the booking dashboard as a DM-reply-time-saver.
sales_recommendation.recommended_register: Warm, first-person, mirror their use of "friends".
sales_recommendation.why: Visible scaling pain (slow DMs) and clear service gaps (no booking link).

visual_style.colors_or_design_notes: Signature terracotta-to-cream gradient on carousel covers.
visual_style.description: Warm earth tones (terracotta, cream, sage). Consistent serif typography. Photography is bright and natural-lit.

user_services.extraction_notes: Extracted 3 case studies from the portfolio page.
past_work_examples: Booking dashboard for a Riyadh dental clinic
Landing page for a Jeddah-based fitness coach
Internal inventory tracker for a Dammam restaurant chain
user_services.primary: Custom web tools — landing pages, dashboards, functional apps.
user_services.service_depth: We build real functional tools, not just landing pages.
user_services.track_record: 8 years of experience, 60+ shipped projects across MENA.
